visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses, a grey flat cap, and a yellow t-shirt stands in a kitchen-like setting next to a white refrigerator. He looks at the camera and gestures expressively with his hands while speaking. (2) He holds up a silver smartphone, showing its screen and back. Icons like a flame and an Apple logo appear as overlays around him while he continues to gesture. (3) The man demonstrates various phone operations: closing applications, unplugging a charging cable, and toggling settings in the Control Center. The background remains consistent with the white fridge and kitchen appliances. (4) He removes a transparent case from the phone and holds the bare device in his hands. He gestures toward the phone as if explaining its cooling properties. (5) Icons of a fan, water droplets, and an air conditioner appear as the man gestures 'no' with his hands. He moves closer to the refrigerator door. (6) He opens the refrigerator door slightly, then closes it with a firm slap. He points directly at the camera with a stern, warning expression while a large red 'X' icon appears on the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c意思意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 夏天手機超燙. [Variety]: 怎麼辦?. (2) [Slogan]: Apple警告! 超過35度. [Subtitle]: iPhone可能永久損壞!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 手機過熱不只降速, 還會自動關機, 耗電也會變快, 甚至會壞掉. (4) [Variety]: 怎麼辦?. [Slogan]: 降溫教學馬上教你. [Slogan]: 第一個 關閉不必要的APP. (5) [Slogan]: 還有 停止充電. [Slogan]: 開啟 飛航模式+低耗電模式. (6) [Slogan]: 保持散熱 拿掉手機殼. [Slogan]: 放到陰涼處. [Slogan]: 不要邊充邊玩. (7) [Slogan]: 外接的散熱風扇 也蠻好用的. (8) [Variety]: 用冰水沖?? [Variety]: 錯. [Variety]: 冷氣出風口 放在那邊? [Variety]: 也錯. (9) [Variety]: 還用冰箱 直接進去降溫. [Variety]: 更錯! [Variety]: 會壞掉 你懂了嗎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator in center frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, and a bright yellow t-shirt with text on the pocket. He has a wooden bead bracelet on his left wrist.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor home environment, specifically a kitchen or utility area. A large white refrigerator is prominent on the right. In the background, white curtains and a small shelf with a coffee machine are visible.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear, energetic male voice begins speaking in a fast-paced, instructional tone. Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music starts simultaneously. (2) A sharp 'Ding' sound effect plays as the speaker emphasizes a warning. The vocal pitch is moderately high with high variability. (3) A series of quick 'Whoosh' and 'Pop' sound effects are triggered as the speaker lists different cooling tips. The BGM remains constant with a strong, synthesized beat. (4) A comic 'Slide' or 'Whistle' SFX occurs when the speaker shifts to debunking common myths. The speaker's tone becomes more emphatic and authoritative. (5) A loud, percussive 'Thud' sound is heard as a heavy door is slammed shut. The speaker ends with a final, sharp rhetorical question delivered with high arousal.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Problem Identification -> Step-by-Step Instructions -> Myth Busting -> Warning/Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate smartphone users on the dangers of device overheating during summer and provide actionable, safe methods for cooling down their phones. The creator also aims to debunk dangerous myths, such as putting electronics in a refrigerator, using a fast-paced and engaging social-short format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Educational PSA content focused on device maintenance without promoting specific commercial products.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced short-form educational video utilizing standard social media engagement tactics like fast cuts, high-contrast text overlays, and cartoon SFX.
